name: closed loop step diff-to-decision records an Adopt decision flowing into promote
command: mkdir -p standards && printf '{"decision":"adopt","change":"5.2.5"}\n' > standards/decisions.jsonl && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/closed-loop-test.sh" --step diff-to-decision --decisions standards/decisions.jsonl --dry-run 2>out.txt && grep -q 'decision=adopt flowed_into=promote' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
